inclusion_validator: Address,

    settlement_block: u64,
    delivery_spc_calls: Vec<SpcCall>,

    // Bytes field must be the very last one
    input: Bytes,

impl Compact for AlloyTxAsyncSettlement {
    fn to_compact<B>(&self, buf: &mut B) -> usize
    where
        B: bytes::BufMut + AsMut<[u8]>,
    {
        let tx = TxAsyncSettlement {
            gas: self.gas,
            gas_price: self.gas_price,
            to: self.to,
            value: self.value,
            origin_tx: self.origin_tx,
            commitment_tx: self.commitment_tx,
            user_address: self.user_address,
atoms.semantic_claim: Async settlement compact storage preserves both delivery SPC calls and settlement SPC calls while converting empty vectors back to None to keep RLP identity stable.

destinations.evidence: preserves delivery_spc_calls and spc_calls, restores None for empty vecs

atoms.equivalence_argument: Async settlement compact storage preserves both delivery and settlement SPC call vectors and converts empty vectors back to None on decode.
